title: SIMPLETASTE Milk Frother, 4-in-1 Electric Milk Steamer, Automatic Warm and Cold Foam Maker and Milk Warmer for Latte, Cappuccinos, Macchiato(Dark Blue)
features: 4-in-1 Multifunctional: Customize your favorite café-style drinks at home with this versatile milk frother. Choose from warm dense foam, warm airy foam, or cold foam; It also warms milk to approximately 65 °C

Easy to Use: Intuitive control with up to four tap modes—tap once for warm dense foam, twice for warm airy foam, three times to heat milk, and four times for cold foam; Auto shut-off when your milk or froth is ready, prevents burning or over-frothing

Rich and Creamy Milk Froth: This frother quickly makes a smooth and velvety milk foam for your cappuccinos, lattes, macchiato, iced coffee and other beverages; It is recommended to use milk with fat content greater than 3% for better results

Large Capacity: For hot chocolate and matcha, warm up to 240 ml (8.2 oz) of milk, or foam up to 115 ml (3.9 oz) of milk at a time for cappuccinos or macchiatos; Perfectly used for sharing coffee with your families and friends, no matter at home or in the office

Easy to Clean: This milk steamer features a scratch-resistant material and a non-stick interior coating for easy cleaning; Its detachable base and dry-burn protection design ensure both safety and effortless cleaning
description: Product Description Important Note: 1. Dock Connection & Button Activation： (1) Allow 3-5 seconds after placing the frother on the base before pressing the button (power-up delay is required for reliable response). (2) Press the center of the button with your thumb to ensure sufficient contact—this prevents unresponsiveness. 2. Frothing Optimization Guide: (1) Select the water level line according to the mode: For ‘Warm Dense Foam Frothing / Warm Airy Foam Frothing / Cold Milk Foam Frothing (No Cooling)’ modes, add milk up to 150ML; for ‘Heating Milk’ mode, add milk up to 240ML. For all modes, do not add milk below the minimum water level line;
